events.title: 2025 Cocoa Festival
events.description: Annual celebration of Ghana's cocoa industry featuring exhibitions, farmer awards, and networking opportunities.

events.title: Farmers' Training Workshop
events.description: Hands-on training session on modern cocoa farming techniques, pest management, and sustainable practices.

events.title: Regional Extension Officers Meeting
events.description: Quarterly meeting for extension officers to share insights and discuss regional implementation strategies.

events.title: World Cocoa Day Celebration
events.description: Join us as we celebrate World Cocoa Day with activities, exhibitions, and community engagement programs.
